description: Configure storage management for the Nx Witness VMS server (https://localhost:7001). Add and enable two storage locations: /opt/nx_storage/primary as a MAIN (Standard) storage location with a reserved space limit of exactly 50 GB, and /opt/nx_storage/backup as a BACKUP (Archive) storage location with a reserved space limit of exactly 20 GB. The directories already exist on the filesystem. Note: 1 GB = 1073741824 bytes.
